course_objectives: To relate with the basic concepts of Probabilistic Models
To understand the scope of Generative Networks in the field of AI.
To recognize various components of Autoencoder Architecture and Training process
To learn the fundamentals of Transfer Learning
Provide students with a comprehensive understanding of ensemble methods and their applications.
To explore the nascent applications of AI
course_outcomes: Acquire basic knowledge of Probabilistic Models
Analyze the working and architecture for Generative Networks
Interpret various components and various types of Autoencoders
Understand various aspects of Transfer Learning
Apply ensemble learning techniques to real-world problems and demonstrate improved predictive performance
Relate to the nascent technologies in the field of artificial intelligence

topics: Introduction: Overview of generative models and their importance in AI
Fundamentals of Probability theory and generative modeling
The discriminator model and generator model
GAN variants and improvements (DCGAN, WGAN, Conditional GAN, CycleGAN)
Challenges: Training instability and model collapse
GAN applications in image synthesis and style transfer
Introduction: Basic components of Variational Autoencoders (VAEs)
Applications of VAEs in image generation
Feature extraction and fine-tune transfer learning
Ensemble Classifiers: Introduction to Ensemble Methods
Evolution of virtual worlds and immersive technologies
Definition and concepts of Augmented Reality
Definition and concept of the Metaverse
Characteristics and components of the Metaverse
Challenges and opportunities in the Metaverse ecosystem
AI in the realm of emerging quantum paradigms
